name: @darwinphi/ph-schools-mcp-server
description: MCP server for querying the Philippine schools dataset

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/mcp-server.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/dataset.js && node --check src/sync.js && node --check src/constants.js && node --check scripts/sync-data.mjs && node --check scripts/check-pack.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release.mjs && node --check test/run-tests.js && node --check test/store.test.js && node --check test/dataset-load.test.js && node --check test/dataset-hybrid.test.js && node --check test/sync.test.js && node --check test/mcp.integration.test.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run check && node test/run-tests.js --suite unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run check && node test/run-tests.js --suite integration

author: darwinphi
